text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm walking down the hallway when I<n>hear voices
from inside a classroom.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm, can we take a break? I think<n>my head's
starting to overheat from<n>all these explanations!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: We just had a break. Please, payattention!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: You look cuter when you smile, Flash.<n>☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If you would focus and listen to what<n>I'm saying,
I'd be smiling.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... But this stuff about triangles<n>and linear
equations is all Greek to<n>me...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I could focus if it was Umadol stuff<n>like dancing
and singing...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: All right. Then let's pretend this is<n>about Umadols.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The tests are your concerts, and the<n>lessons are
your rehearsals. So if you<n>don't learn these
formulas, what<n>does that make you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umm... An Umadol who doesn't<n>memorize the
lyrics?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: W-wait! But then... that means I've<n>been...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! Where's my Umadol pride?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols always stay on top of their<n>duties and
shine with all their might!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Well said! Then I take it you know<n>what needs to
be done?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I've gotta rehearse! I'll head<n>down to the
studio and practice my<n>dance routine right away!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...My best efforts, all for nothing. Who<n>can make
her figure this out?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me. If you have time,<n>would you mind
giving her a word of<n>advice?
choice_data_list: Don't cut corners when it comes to your studies!
Always work toward achieving your dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, do I really have to study?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Don't get so down. Studying is just<n>like dance
lessons—you learn as you<n>go!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Besides, you never cut corners with<n>anything,
right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Weeell, I guess not. I always take<n>everything very
seriously as an<n>Umadol! But...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: See, the word "everything" refersquite literally to every thing, whichof course includes—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, okay, I get it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon practically cries out the<n>words, but
eventually starts to study<n>seriously.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I want to shine, body and soul!<n>Which
means... time for dance<n>practice! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no, that's not the conclusion<n>you were
supposed to...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Sigh. We were supposed to studyfor 39 more minutes. My schedule...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon successfully escapes<n>studying and
throws her whole soul<n>into her dance lessons.
